Welcome to UGIP

Uttarakhand Government Institute of Polytechnic is a premier technical education institute in Nainital, established in 1956. We are committed to providing quality education and producing skilled professionals.

Our institute offers diploma programs in various engineering disciplines and pharmacy, with state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced faculty, and industry-relevant curriculum.

Principal's Message

"Welcome to UGIP Nainital, where we transform lives through technical education."

Since our establishment in 1956, we have been committed to providing quality education. Our institute boasts state-of-the-art facilities, experienced faculty, and a curriculum designed to meet industry demands. We believe in holistic development, encouraging students to participate in extracurricular activities and community service.
